title: OCEAN FLOOR MAPPING WITH LONG-ENDURANCE UNMANNED SYSTEMS

body.description:
The Contracting Department, NAVSUP Fleet Logistic Center (FLC), Norfolk intends to solicit a Firm-Fixed-Price (FFP), multiple award Indefinite Delivery, Indefinite Quantity (IDIQ) contract and will utilize procedures under Federal Acquisition Regualtion (FAR) Part Part 12, Part 15 and Subpart 16.5.

The Government intends to procure one (1) 24-month base ordering period. The anticipated date of the award is on or about 1 August 2026.

The NAICS code for this solicitation is 541330 (Exception 3) for Marine Engineering and Naval Architecture. The size standard is $47,000,000.00.
